title: Salty Crispy German Chicken Samosas
description: A twist on traditional samosas, these German-inspired pastries are filled with salty chicken and wrapped in crispy filo dough, perfect for a snack or meal prep. They are sugar-free and can be cooked to a crispy perfection in a tandoor or oven.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor or oven to 400°F (200°C).
In a large bowl, mix together chicken, salt, black pepper, onion, garlic, and ginger.
Add the chicken broth and olive oil to the bowl and mix until the chicken is well coated.
Lay a sheet of filo pastry on a flat surface and brush with a little water.
Place about 1 tablespoon of the chicken mixture in the center of the pastry.
Fold the pastry into a triangle and press the edges together to seal the samosa.
Repeat with the remaining pastry and chicken mixture.
Brush the tops of the samosas with a little water and sprinkle with sesame seeds if desired.
Cook the samosas in the preheated tandoor or oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
